["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"收录范围","children":"收录范围"}],"

",["$r","p",null,{"children":["再选择你的 Debian/Ubuntu 版本，将下方内容写入 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/gitlab-ce.list"}]]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"操作系统版本","items":[["Debian 13",{"release":"trixie","os":"debian"}],["Debian 12",{"release":"bookworm","os":"debian"}],["Debian 11",{"release":"bullseye","os":"debian"}],["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release":"noble","os":"ubuntu"}],["Ubuntu 22.04 LTS",{"release":"jammy","os":"ubuntu"}]]}],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"properties","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/gitlab-ce.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"安装 gitlab-ce:"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"

",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/gitlab-ce.repo"}],"，内容为"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/gitlab-ce.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"再执行"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
